title: sukhorukovia cana
intro: Sukhorukovia cana is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Sukhorukovia cana include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its bronchodilatory effects. Herbal preparations of Sukhorukovia cana are typically made by infusing the plant material in hot water to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
